# Personal Data Protection Law

Jurisdiction: Argentina
Region: AR
Citation: Ley 25.326 de Protección de los Datos Personales
Authority: AAIP / Government of Argentina
Source URL: https://www.argentina.gob.ar/aaip/datospersonales
Topics: notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, cross_border_transfer, retention_deletion, data_minimization, accountability
Keywords: Argentina Law 25.326, habeas data, sensitive data, database registration, 阿根廷

## Summary
Argentina's personal data law based on consent, data quality, information duties, access/rectification/deletion rights, database rules, sensitive data protections, and international transfer restrictions.

## Key compliance obligations
- Inform data subjects and obtain consent unless an exception applies.
- Maintain data quality and confidentiality.
- Support access, rectification, update, and deletion rights.
- Control international transfers.
